title: KrakenD Endpoint
description: An Endpoint defines a public-facing URL pattern that the KrakenD gateway exposes to clients, along with its associated backends, encoding, rate limiting, and other configurations.

endpoint.description: The URL pattern the gateway exposes to clients. Must start with a slash.

method.description: The HTTP method this endpoint accepts. Create multiple endpoint entries for different methods.

output_encoding.description: The encoding used to render the response to the client.

concurrent_calls.description: Number of concurrent calls to each backend for this endpoint.

timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for the endpoint to complete. E.g., 2s or 2000ms.

cache_ttl.description: Duration for Cache-Control max-age header. E.g., 300s or 5m.

querystring_params.description: Allowed query string parameters to forward to backends. Use * to forward all.

headers_to_pass.description: List of client headers forwarded to the backend.

backend.description: List of backend definitions this endpoint connects to.

extra_config.description: Additional component configurations keyed by namespace.

input_query_strings.description: Recognized query string parameters that can be used in the endpoint.

input_headers.description: Recognized headers that can be used in the endpoint.
